title: Open Call Configuration Schema
description: Schema for validating open-call.json files used in Photo Open Call Analyzer. See ADR-007: Configuration Validation Schema.

theme.description: Photography theme or subject description for this competition

description.description: Detailed description of the open call, its aesthetic values, and what it rewards

aestheticContext.description: Explicit aesthetic evaluation framing injected into prompts. Use when the call values unconventional qualities.

description.description: What a high score means for this criterion

criteria.description: User-defined evaluation criteria with weights. When present, these override AI-generated criteria.

items.description: Name or title of jury member

jury.description: List of jury members (their names, roles, or affiliations)

pastWinners.description: Description of past winning photos and their characteristics (style, themes, technical quality)

model.description: Optional Ollama vision model override for this project (e.g., 'llava:13b', 'moondream'). See FR-3.9 / ADR-019.

context.description: Optional additional context for evaluation (e.g., competition mission, special focus areas)

customCriteria.description: Optional: Custom evaluation criteria (if not provided, AI generates from theme/jury)

submissionRules.description: Submission-level compliance rules (FR-4.3). Validated by submission-validator.js.

maxPhotos.description: Maximum number of photos allowed in submission

maxSizeMB.description: Maximum file size per photo in MB

photoGroups.description: Optional photo sub-groups/series for constrained set generation (FR-4.8). When defined, suggest-sets generates combinations only within each group.

pattern.description: Glob pattern to match filenames in photos/ directory (e.g., 'rotterdam*.jpg', '2025-10-*.jpg')

label.description: Human label for this source (e.g., 'jury portfolio', 'gallery about')

url.description: URL to fetch for research context

researchUrls.description: Optional URLs for strategic research phase (jury sites, gallery pages, past winner links). Used by strategic-research and strategic-advise commands.

setMode.description: Configuration for set/group analysis (e.g., Polaroid 4-photo sets). See ADR-015.

setSize.description: Number of photos per set (default: 4 for Polaroid)

setCriteria.description: Criteria for evaluating photo sets as a group (if not provided, defaults are used)

maxSetsToEvaluate.description: Maximum number of candidate sets to fully evaluate with vision model

individualWeight.description: Weight of individual photo scores in final set score (0-100)

setWeight.description: Weight of set-level scores in final set score (0-100)
